rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `mapsTo_fiber_symm`'s proof duplicates `mapsTo_fiber` applied to `φ⁻¹`; `Subgroup.coe_inv` and the homeomorphism inverse definition confirm `(φ⁻¹ : Deck p).1 = φ.1.symm`, making the 5-line proof reducible to `mapsTo_fiber φ⁻¹ b`. Under the generality rubric this is a real, checkable finding a maintainer would want fixed; Review 2 misses it entirely.
